items.titolo: Cybercriminal Twins Caught After They Forgot to Turn Off Microsoft Teams Recording
items.descrizione: Plus: Instructure’s Canvas ransomware debacle comes to a close, an alleged dark net market kingpin gets arrested, OpenAI workers fall victim to a supply chain attack, and more.

items.titolo: Gemini Intelligence, requisiti molto elevati: escluso anche Galaxy Z Fold 7?
items.descrizione: Servono 12 GB di RAM, un chip "flagship" (anche uno Snapdragon S4 del 2012?) e soprattutto il supporto ufficiale a Gemini Nano v3.

items.titolo: First Apple M5 memory exploit discovered using Anthropic AI, gives root access on MacOS — Claude Mythos helps security researchers bypass Memory Integrity Enforcement
items.descrizione: Apple M5 architecture gets its first privilege escalation exploit
